top_signals.title: Carney warns Alberta separatists of Brexit-style regret
top_signals.summary: Canada’s prime minister says oil-rich province’s push for independence is a ‘dangerous bluff’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan Overtakes India in Stock Market Value
top_signals.summary:
Taiwan has overtaken India in stock market value, powered largely by a breakneck rally in chipmaker TSMC.

Bernadette Toh explains what gave Taiwan’s stock market an edge over India’s in the face of fierce AI optimism. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Tumbles as US and Iran Seen Moving Closer to Deal
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell nearly 7% on Monday as optimism grew that the United States and Iran were moving closer to a peace deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, even though Washington and Tehran played down hopes for an imminent breakthrough.Brent crude futures LCOc1 were down $7.24…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia Says Magnetic Mines Found on Tanker
top_signals.summary: Several magnetic mines had been detected on a tanker in Russia's Baltic Sea port of Ust-Luga, Russia's Investigative Committee said on Monday.The committee said the mines, manufactured in a NATO country, were found by divers during an inspection of the hull of the tanker Arrhenius…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nine Crypto Whales Dominate Polymarket Disputes Worth Billions
top_signals.summary: The company has delayed efforts to revamp the voting process it uses for resolving thousands of prediction market disputes
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Barnes & Noble's Improbable Revival
top_signals.summary: Barnes & Noble transformed from a dying chain to private equity darling by ditching the corporate playbook. An IPO and AI could be next. Lia Ehrl-Corbo has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kremlin appoints cyber executive with alleged GRU ties to Security Council role
top_signals.summary: Andrei Kozlov, the former head of a cybersecurity center within Russia’s state-owned defense conglomerate Rostec, was named an aide to Security Council Secretary Sergei Shoigu on Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Canadian steel sector faces deeper pain than aluminum as tariff uncertainty clouds outlook
top_signals.summary: Federal support package seen as short-term relief while industry braces for prolonged trade disruption.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SAAM Orders Second Tug from ASENAV per Fleet Expansion and Upgrade Plan
top_signals.summary: SAAM Towage announced the construction of a new state-of-the-art tugboat by the Chilean shipyard ASENAV, reaffirming its commitment to the local shipbuilding industry. This new vessel joins the tug ordered earlier this year, furthering the strategic partnership between the two companies. The vessel is a 32-meter-long Robert Allan RAstar 3200W design with a bollard pull ...
